rules.name: Mandatory compatibility check
rules.requiredAction: Stop processing, record bypass attempt and run the complete boundary check.

rules.name: Complete boundary evaluation
rules.requiredAction: Evaluate every applicable Gate-11 Phase 2 family and preserve matched Rule IDs.

rules.name: Strictest decision aggregation
rules.requiredAction: Select the highest-precedence decision; no lower decision may override it.

rules.name: No match handling
rules.requiredAction: Block automatic reuse and obtain human compatibility review.

rules.name: Full revalidation gate
rules.requiredAction: List affected Gates; Blueprint remains Draft Only until every revalidation is completed.

rules.name: Boundary evidence binding
rules.requiredAction: Bind input hash, Gate source revisions, all matched Rule IDs, decision and required actions.
